productDisplayName: Wrangler Men American Music Folk Green T-Shirts
description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves that have brand print and distressed graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryGroove to the tunes of American music in style with this green t-shirt from wrangler. Pay tribute to the brand that set shop in Greensboro and grew to tremendous heights to clothe the world in fabulous wear for a century. The short sleeves sit snug on well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps your fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and leather sandals for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
